Creates an IndexedDB-backed KV storage tier.

## Import

```ts
import { indexedDbKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/browser";
```

```ts
	spec: IndexedDbBackendSpec,
	opts: IndexedDbKvOptions<T> = {},
): KvStorageTier<T>
```
